# TokenUsage LLMs Index

TokenUsage tracks token usage across AI coding agent clients (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Kiro, Gemini, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Every Code).

## Canonical URL
- [Homepage](https://github.com/Aniian709/TokenUsage)

## Priority URLs
- [Homepage](https://github.com/Aniian709/TokenUsage)
- [Repository](https://github.com/Aniian709/TokenUsage)

## Product
- Install command: `npx tokenusage-cli`
- [NPM package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/tokenusage-cli)
- [Source repository](https://github.com/Aniian709/TokenUsage)

## Policy and Discovery
- [llms.txt](https://github.com/Aniian709/TokenUsage/blob/main/dashboard/public/llms.txt)
- Data principle: token counts only, never prompts or conversation content.

## Contact
- [GitHub issues](https://github.com/Aniian709/TokenUsage/issues)
